tagline: Burbank's Trusted Transmission Specialists Since Day One

hero.heading: Burbank's Transmission Experts
hero.subheading: Rebuilds, repairs, and diagnostics done right — backed by a perfect 5-star rating and 27+ reviews. Your transmission is in expert hands.

about.heading: Built on Trust, Driven by Precision
paragraphs: At Crabtree Automatics, transmissions aren't just what we fix — they're all we do. Located on Magnolia Blvd in the heart of Burbank, our shop has earned a reputation for honest diagnostics, quality parts, and repairs that last.

Whether your transmission is slipping, shuddering, or due for a fluid service, our team has the expertise to get you back on the road with confidence. We service both automatic and manual transmissions across all major makes and models.

services.title: Transmission Rebuild
services.description: Complete teardown, inspection, and rebuild of automatic and manual transmissions using quality parts and precise tolerances.

services.title: Transmission Repair
services.description: Targeted repair of specific transmission issues — from solenoid replacement to valve body work — without a full rebuild.

services.title: Transmission Fluid Service
services.description: Fluid flush and filter replacement to extend the life of your transmission and prevent costly failures down the road.

services.title: Diagnostics & Inspection
services.description: Computer-assisted and hands-on diagnostics to accurately identify transmission problems before recommending any work.

services.title: Clutch Replacement
services.description: Expert clutch repair and replacement for manual transmission vehicles — from daily drivers to performance builds.

services.title: Torque Converter Service
services.description: Inspection, repair, and replacement of torque converters to restore smooth power delivery and eliminate shuddering.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: Best transmission shop in the valley. They diagnosed the problem in minutes and had my truck back in two days. Fair price, honest people.

reviews.name: Sandra K.
reviews.text: I was quoted $4,000 at the dealer. Crabtree fixed the same issue for half the price and it's been running perfectly for over a year now.

reviews.name: David T.
reviews.text: These guys know transmissions inside and out. They explained everything clearly, didn't try to upsell me, and the repair was done right the first time.

reviews.name: Laura M.
reviews.text: Brought in my Honda with a slipping transmission. They rebuilt it and it shifts better than when I bought the car. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: James P.
reviews.text: Honest shop with real expertise. They told me what I needed and what I didn't. You can trust these guys with your vehicle.

reviews.name: Angela W.
reviews.text: After two other shops couldn't figure out the problem, Crabtree nailed it on the first visit. Professional, fast, and affordable.

faq.question: How long does a transmission rebuild take?
faq.answer: Most rebuilds are completed within 3 to 5 business days, depending on parts availability and the complexity of the job.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
faq.answer: Yes. All transmission repairs and rebuilds come with a warranty. We stand behind our work and use quality parts on every job.

faq.question: How do I know if my transmission needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include delayed or rough shifting, slipping gears, transmission warning light, unusual noises, or fluid leaks under the vehicle.

faq.question: Do you work on both automatic and manual transmissions?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We service both automatic and manual transmissions across all major makes and models.

faq.question: Can I get a diagnosis before committing to a repair?
faq.answer: Of course. We always start with a thorough diagnostic and give you an honest assessment before any work begins. No surprises.

seo.title: Crabtree Automatics | Transmission Repair & Rebuild in Burbank, CA
seo.description: Burbank's trusted transmission specialists. Expert automatic and manual transmission repair, rebuilds, and diagnostics. 5-star rated with 27+ reviews. Call (818) 845-9117.
